MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mary M. Sackett, Esquire, appearing on behalf of the Plaintiff and moving party. Kristin Sato, Esquire, appearing on behalf of Defendants Interdent and Yep Dental.

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted by the court.
Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, and Form Interrogatories, Set One, is granted as to the discovery set forth in the notice of motion: Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Request For Production Of Documents, Set One. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,015, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)
